site.name: China Survival Guide
site.subtitle: Everything foreigners need to survive and thrive in China
site.description: A comprehensive guide for foreigners visiting or living in China. Covers visas, border crossing, daily life, emergencies, and departure procedures.

home.hero_subtitle: Your complete guide to navigating China as a foreigner — from visa application to departure, and everything in between.
home.stages_subtitle: Six stages of the foreigner experience in China, each with detailed guides.
home.featured_subtitle: Essential reads handpicked for every traveler.
home.ready_subtitle: Get started with our step-by-step guides covering every stage of your journey.

pre_entry.title: Pre-Entry
pre_entry.description: Visa applications, document preparation, and everything you need before traveling.

border_crossing.title: Border Crossing
border_crossing.description: Immigration procedures, customs declarations, and what to expect at the airport.

first_72_hours.title: First 72 Hours
first_72_hours.description: SIM cards, mobile payments, accommodation registration, and getting settled.

daily_survival.title: Daily Survival
daily_survival.description: Transportation, banking, food, shopping, and everyday life in China.

emergency.title: Emergency
emergency.description: Lost passports, medical help, legal issues, and what to do when things go wrong.

departure.title: Departure
departure.description: Tax refunds, exit procedures, and what to prepare before leaving China.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to common questions about traveling and living in China.

about.title: About This Guide
about.subtitle: Our mission and methodology
about.content: China Survival Guide is a comprehensive, up-to-date resource for foreigners navigating life in China. Created by experienced travelers and China residents, our goal is to make your China experience smooth, safe, and enjoyable. All information is regularly reviewed and updated to reflect current policies and procedures.

footer.disclaimer: This guide provides general information and should not be considered legal advice. Policies may change; always verify with official sources.
